payoff: Supero - robotic automation solutions for industry
payoff_supero_finish:
Intelligent robotic finishing:
 from scanning to polishing in a single flow
working_description:
From repetitiveness to risk, production activities can be a burden for teams.
 Supero integrates collaborative and industrial robots, 3D vision, and easy-to-use software to automate processes, improving quality, productivity, and safety.
developed_performs_description: Supero's robotic solutions bring speed, consistency, and scalability to manufacturing. From sanding and coating to welding, they ensure higher quality, stable throughput, and measurable efficiency—ready to grow with your production needs.
what_can_you_do: What can you do today with Supero?
let_it_do_description: Supero automates the heavy, repetitive tasks that slow production down. With an intuitive interface that guides every phase—from start to stop—operators manage processes with ease. The result: fewer errors, safer workflows, and higher quality at scale.
what_you_will_do_tomorrow: What will you be able to do with our Supero platform tomorrow?
video_claim:
Automated finishing.
Watch it in action.
problem_analysis: Understanding the process to unlock efficiency. We study your workflow in detail, identifying friction points, repetitive tasks, and opportunities where automation can deliver real performance gains.
requirement_collection: From challenges to measurable goals. We define every operational need — targets, constraints, materials, and cycles — translating them into technical requirements for a precise solution design.
tech_r&d: We experiment and test advanced technologies to ensure high performance and innovative solutions.
deployment_testing: Our team manages setup, calibration, and validation directly on-site, ensuring the system runs reliably under real production conditions.
business_integration: Automation that becomes part of your workflow. We train your team, monitor data, and optimize performance over time — turning technology into a concrete, measurable advantage.
does_it_work: Want to know more? Fill out the form to discover how we can help transform your business.
which_product: Which application are you interested in?*
get_in_touch:
Ready to see how robotics can transform your production? 
Let’s talk about your challenges and design the right solution together.

step_0.title: Software that adapts to your production
step_0.description:
SUPERO is the software platform designed to automate surface finishing processes on unknown and variable geometries, the ideal solution for high-mix production.

It integrates with industrial and collaborative robots and supports external axes, extending the working volume to meet production requirements.

step_1.title:
Mirka
Sander
step_1.description: The Mirka random orbital sander performs sanding and polishing operations. Thanks to SUPERO OS control, pressure and feed rate are managed throughout the process, ensuring a uniform finish on any geometry.

step_2.title:
Compensation Unit
Schunk
step_2.description: Integrated on the robot arm, it automatically compensates for surface variations, maintaining constant pressure even on complex and irregular shapes.

step_3.title:
3D Vision System
Zivid
step_3.description: The vision system mounted on the cobot performs a 3D scan of the component, capturing data on its shape, position and colour. SUPERO OS processes the scan to generate a digital twin, on which the machining path is automatically planned.

step_4.title:
Linear axis
R3GO Monguzzi
step_4.description: The R3GO linear axis from Monguzzi srl extends the reach of the robotic arm along a translational axis, increasing the working volume of the SUPERO Finish. It enables the processing of large workpieces or the coverage of multiple workstations in a single cycle.

step_section.title: simple steps
step_section.scan:
Thanks to its integrated vision system, Supero Finish autonomously performs a high-precision 3D scan to capture data relating to topology, position and colour. It instantly generates a complete digital twin of the component, which is reconstructed and rendered within our proprietary SUPERO OS software.

The system automatically performs the necessary data cleaning and optimisation operations, providing a digital model ready for process definition and toolpath generation.
step_section.path:
With SUPERO OS, the operator selects the work areas directly on the component’s digital twin. The software automatically generates the toolpath for the selected area or, if preferred, for the entire surface, without any manual input. For each pass, the process parameters can be configured: applied force, feed rate and tool rotation speed.

It is also possible to programme multiple passes with different parameters, combining, for example, an initial roughing pass and a final polishing pass to achieve the desired result.
step_section.let_it_work:
Once started, SUPERO Finish manages the entire process autonomously. The tool maintains optimal alignment with the surface and adjusts the applied force in real time.

The integrated compensation unit ensures constant pressure and uniform contact even on complex geometries, delivering a high-quality finish on every workpiece.
step_section.switch_repeat:
Achieve continuous production with zero downtime. When the part is replaced, Supero Finish is able to generate a new 3D surface map and seamlessly resumes processing.

Simply switch the part, the system does the rest.
